title: Metabolic homeostasis favors tolerance to persistent viral infection in Aedes aegypti mosquitoes
author: Perdomo, Hugo D.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Description: 
 
 This repository contains the raw data used to produce this manuscript with the exception of the small RNA sequencing and its analysis.  
 Original raw reads used for this research paper are publicly available (after publication) at the SRA database under the BioProject ID:  PRJNA1287247 . 
 The bioinformatic protocols used to analyse the data are availavle at https://github.com/naborlozada/Perdomo_et_al_2025_sRNA_analysis
